title: eBay Category Changes: Everything Else
notes: Cross-category for items that don't fit in other categories, includes subcategories like Information Products, Genealogy, Religious Products

title: eBay Buyer Protection
notes: Buyer protection program with money back guarantee on virtually all items

title: How to Enable eBay App Notifications
notes: Push notifications for order updates, shopping updates, selling activities via app, email, or SMS

title: Seller Hub | Seller Center
notes: Centralized order management through Seller Hub for managing orders, shipping labels, returns, and tracking

title: eBay is managing payments
notes: eBay's managed payments system for buyers and sellers, replacing PayPal as primary payment processor

title: Seller Hub | Seller Center
notes: Suite of seller tools including Seller Hub, research tools, bulk listing tools, and AI-powered features

title: Seller Hub | Seller Center
notes: Duplicate node - same as seller-tools

title: Service providers | eBay.en
notes: Third-party service providers and eBay services category for specialized business services

title: The eBay Stores Shopping Experience | Seller Center
notes: Subscription-based branded storefronts for sellers with discounted fees and exclusive tools

title: Seller Help | Seller Center
notes: Customer support resources including help center, chat, and phone support

title: Sustainable Commerce - eBay Inc.
notes: eBay's sustainability initiatives including 100% renewable energy operations and net-zero emissions target by 2045

title: Tax Information | Seller Center
notes: Tax information for sellers including 1099-K reporting and sales tax collection

title: eBay Verticals Apps Go Universal
notes: Category-specific teams and experiences for Motors, Fashion, Collectibles, and other specialized verticals

title: Handling time | Seller Center
notes: Handling time requirement for same-day or 1-day package preparation, required for Top Rated Plus status

title: 1099-K and Tax Withholding FAQs | Seller Center
notes: Tax form for reporting payment transactions, threshold restored to $20,000 and 200 transactions for 2025

title: Spendable Funds Terms and Conditions
notes: Two-factor authentication security feature required for Stored Value Account and certain account actions

title: Returns | Seller Center
notes: Minimum 30-day return policy option for sellers, required for Top Rated Seller status and Parts & Accessories

title: Returns | Seller Center
notes: Extended 60-day return policy option available as buyer-paid or free returns

title: Seller Performance Standards | eBay Seller Center
notes: Seller performance level based on cases closed without resolution, transaction defects, and late shipments

title: Seller Performance Standards | eBay Seller Center
notes: Duplicate node - same as above-standard

title: Adding Best Offer to your listing and sending offers to buyers
notes: Feature allowing sellers to accept, decline, or counter buyer offers through Best Offer

title: Managing returns | Seller Center
notes: Seller action to accept return requests with options for full refund, partial refund, or replacement

title: eBay Security Center - Homepage
notes: Security resources for protecting accounts, reporting concerns, and preventing unauthorized access

title: All About My eBay - My Account
notes: Account configuration and preferences including team access, notifications, and personal information

title: Account restrictions and suspensions
notes: Account restrictions due to outstanding fees, policy violations, or security concerns

title: Account restrictions and suspensions
notes: Duplicate node - same as account-suspended

title: Active Content | eBay Seller Center
notes: Policy prohibiting JavaScript, Flash, and other active content in listings as of June 2017

title: The 'All Selling' view in Seller Hub
notes: Seller Hub feature for managing live listings, sending offers, and updating item specifics in bulk

title: How eBay Advertising attribution works
notes: Attribution models for tracking sales from promoted listings including direct and halo attribution

title: How eBay Advertising attribution works
notes: Fees charged for promoted listings based on ad rate percentage or cost-per-click depending on strategy

title: Promoted Listings - Ad Rate Trends
notes: Suggested ad rate percentages for promoted listings based on item attributes, seasonality, and competition

title: Adding a reimbursement payment method
notes: Feature for adding credit/debit cards or bank accounts for fee payments and seller reimbursements

title: eBay's Shopping Cart
notes: Shopping cart feature allowing buyers to add multiple items before checkout

title: Your Watchlist
notes: Feature allowing buyers to save up to 1,000 items for tracking with price drop alerts

notes: Duplicate node - same as add-to-watch-list

notes: Enhanced listing creation tool with AI features for descriptions and backgrounds

notes: Duplicate node - same as advanced-listing-tool

title: Advanced search
notes: Search refinement tool with filters for category, price, condition, seller, and Boolean operators

title: Celebrating 25 Years: Shop 25 Top Brands in Special eBay Anniversary Sale
notes: Annual sales event celebrating eBay milestones, including 20th (2015) and 25th (2020) anniversaries
